nasb.text: But Philip found himself at Azotus, and as he passed through he kept preaching the gospel to all the cities until he came to Caesarea.

esv.text: But Philip found himself at Azotus, and as he passed through he preached the gospel to all the towns until he came to Caesarea.

cnv.text: 後來有人在亞鎖都遇見腓利。他走遍各城，傳講福音，直到該撒利亞。

ccb.text: 后来，腓利出现在亚锁都。他走遍那里，在各城各乡传扬福音，直到凯撒利亚。

csbs.text: 后来，腓利出现在阿佐托。他走遍各个城镇传扬福音，直到他来到凯撒里亚。
